CheckTitle: Ensure at least one Conditional Access policy targets guest/external users
Description: Verifies that at least one enabled Conditional Access policy explicitly targets guest or external users, ensuring they are subject to access controls such as MFA or device compliance.
Risk: If no CA policy targets guest or external users, these identities may bypass all Conditional Access protections. Attackers frequently compromise guest accounts as a lateral-movement vector into partner tenants.

Remediation.Recommendation: Create a Conditional Access policy that targets 'GuestsOrExternalUsers' to enforce MFA, session controls, or block risky sign-ins for external identities.

SourceNotes: AI-generated framework mappings — verify before citing in compliance reports.
